response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed scene detection. 2. Identified VTuber performance (Shiranui Flare and IRyS). 3. Song 1 (00:12-04:02) identified as '刹那' based on on-screen credits. Lyrics found through web search. 4. Transition (04:02-04:05) identified. 5. Song 2 (04:05-05:00) identified as 'Harmonia' based on on-screen credits. Lyrics transcribed directly from the video as they appear on-screen.
response.global_summary: The video is a performance featuring VTubers Shiranui Flare and IRyS. It begins with an intro by Shiranui Flare, followed by two musical performances. The first song, '刹那' (Setsuna), is performed by Shiranui Flare and IRyS. The second song, 'Harmonia', is performed by Shiranui Flare. Lyrics are shown on-screen throughout the performances.

scenes.description: VTuber Shiranui Flare introduces herself and the upcoming performance, waving and talking to the audience.
Shiranui Flare and IRyS perform '刹那' (Setsuna). The video displays '作詞:Dai. 作曲・編曲:Starving Trancer / Ryu☆'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ゆらめく影をまとい 風が抜ける
悲しみ残して 今蒼が消える
こぼれてゆく 欠片なら 砕け散るまで
壊れゆく現実 沈黙の代償は
信じ続けたキミさえ 失うなら
翳る時を 待ち焦がれてた
いつも どこか 知っていた 迷える夜を穿つ
燃え盛るは 誓った約束
今蒼が堕ちる
色を無くす その先は 誰も知らない
破り捨てる 嘘の鎖 真実脱ぎ捨て 嗤う
蒼が堕ちる 色を無くす その先は
目を閉じるだけ
さまようこの心は 明日を求め 過去さえ切り裂く
今蒼に染まる
満たしていく 一色に
[...lyrics continue...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yurameku kage wo matoi, kaze ga nukeru
Kanashimi nokoshite ima ao ga kieru
Koborete yuku kakera nara kudake chiru made
Kowareyuku genjitsu chinmoku no daishou wa
Shinji tsuzuketa kimi sae ushinau nara
Kaeru toki wo machikogareteta
Itsumo dokoka shitteta mayoeru yoru wo ugatsu
Moesakaru wa chitta yakusoku
Ima ao ga ochiru
Iro wo nakusu sono saki wa daremo shiranai
Yaburisuteru uso no kusari shinjitsu nugisute warau
Ao ga ochiru iro wo nakusu sono saki wa
Me wo tojiru dake
Samayou kono kokoro wa ashita wo motome kako sae kirisaku
Ima ao ni somaru
Mitashite yuku isshoku ni
[...lyrics continue...]

scenes.description: A short transition pause before the next performance. Title 'Harmonia' is displayed.
Shiranui Flare performs 'Harmonia'. The video displays '作詞・作曲・編曲:Konami Arcade Games (PON)'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界が輝く その瞬間
ちょっとでも 触れたくって
幻をのぞいて 空間が 重なって 溶け合う
太陽と月のように
巡り出す空の残像
時間を超えては つながる
響きあうこの心
大胆不敵な 空想の輪郭を 追いかけて
広がっては 飲み込んでいく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The world shines, that moment
Just wanting to touch it a little
Peering at the illusion, the space overlaps and melts together
Like the sun and the moon
The afterimage of the sky spreading out
Transcending time and connecting
The heart resonating together
Chasing the bold and fearless contours of fantasy
It spreads and consumes
